notes: CADIVI (Comision de Administracion de Divisas) established; initial fixed official buy/sell rates. Currency later redenominated (VEB->VEF 2008 at 1000:1, VEF->VES 2018 at 100000:1) -- rates below are in the unit stated at the time, NOT rebased for cross-period comparison
Dual official fixed-rate tier (Bolivar Fuerte, post-2008 redenomination)
Official fixed rate at this point
Parallel/black-market rate -- ~100x the official fixed rate
Parallel/black-market rate immediately pre-redenomination (in old Bolivar Fuerte units)
Same period, expressed in the NEW Bolivar Soberano unit after the 2018-08-20 redenomination (100,000 VEF = 1 VES)
Parallel/black-market rate -- roughly 2.7x the official DICOM rate at the same date
SIMADI (Sistema Marginal de Divisas) tier introduced -- a third official exchange tier alongside CENCOEX (6.3) and SICAD I (12) at this date
CENCOEX tier (successor to CADIVI) -- most favorable official rate, reserved for priority imports (food/medicine)
SICAD I tier -- second official rate tier
